docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,698.31 FILED BY BLATTEIS REALTY CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, IAN GORDON BENNETT CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, IAN GORDON BENNETT CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLATTEIS REALTY CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, IAN GORDON BENNETT CO. $3,246.66 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,294.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT IN INSTALLMENTS WAS MAILED A FORM WITH INSTRUCTION TO COMPLETE FORM & TO INCLUDE A $14 CHECK FOR COURT FEE.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, IAN GORDON BENNETT CO. HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JAN-07-2000, GRANTED
